item.category: This text discusses various payment identifiers and systems, including x402 Sign-In-With-X (SIWX), x402 Payment-Identifier, Openclaw Hermes, A2A, and integrations with payment processors like Google, Visa, Stripe, OpenAI, and Shopify. It also references MCP and different payment technologies.
